start.text: The sun is warm. You are Moonpaw. You are a cat in WindClan. You are an apprentice. You are learning to be a warrior. Your mentor is Crowfeather. He is grey and fast. 'Moonpaw!' he calls. 'We must go to the forest. A kit is lost. The kit is from RiverClan. We must find it before the big dog finds it!'

choices.text: Look for tracks on the grass

ask_danger.text: Crowfeather looks at you. 'Yes, it is dangerous. There is a big dog near the river. But we are warriors! We are brave.' He starts to run. You follow him.

look_tracks.text: You look at the ground. You see small paw prints. They go to the dark forest. 'Good job, Moonpaw!' Crowfeather says. 'You have a good nose.'

run_forest.text: The forest is dark. The trees are very tall. You hear a sound. *Woof! Woof!* The dog is near! You see the small kit. It is a silver cat. It is hiding under a log. The kit is crying.

choices.text: Hiss at the dog to scare it
Climb a tree to see the dog

climb_tree.text: You climb the tall oak tree. You see the dog. It is big and brown. It is sniffing the log. The kit is very scared. You must act now!

choices.text: Meow loudly to distract the dog

hiss_dog.text: You stand tall. You make your fur big. 'HSSSS!' you cry. The dog stops. It is surprised. Crowfeather jumps from a bush and bites the dog's tail. The dog runs away!

jump_dog.text: You are brave! You jump from the tree onto the dog. The dog is angry. It spins around. Crowfeather helps you. The dog is scared and runs to the Twolegplace.

choices.text: Check if the kit is okay

distract_dog.text: You meow very loudly. The dog looks at you. It starts to run toward your tree. The kit is now safe. Crowfeather grabs the kit by the neck and runs to the bushes.

grab_kit.text: You run to the log. You grab the kit. But you are an apprentice, and the kit is heavy. You are slow. The dog sees you!

hide_hole.text: You find a small hole under a rock. You and the kit go inside. It is very tight. The dog barks outside, but it cannot get in. After a long time, it goes away.

save_kit.text: The kit is safe! Its name is Silverkit. 'Thank you, Moonpaw!' the kit squeaks. You walk back to the river. The RiverClan leader is there. She is happy.

reward.text: The RiverClan leader smiles. She gives you a big, tasty fish. 'This is for a brave apprentice,' she says. You eat the fish. It is delicious!

ending.text: You return to the WindClan camp. Your leader, Onestar, is proud. 'Moonpaw, you saved a life today. You are a good apprentice.' You go to sleep in your soft moss bed. You are happy.

vocabulary.apprentice: Schüler / Lehrling (a young cat learning to hunt and fight)
vocabulary.mentor: Lehrer (an older cat who teaches the apprentice)
vocabulary.hiss: fauchen (the sound an angry cat makes)
vocabulary.distract: ablenken (to make someone look at something else)
vocabulary.log: Baumstamm (a part of a dead tree on the ground)
vocabulary.moss: Moos (soft green plant cats use for beds)
